71042c5b.description: PM agent — any actionable GitHub state across both repos?

checks.name: in-development-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: ready-for-review-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:ready-for-review --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:ready-for-review --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: changes-requested-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:changes-requested --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:changes-requested --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: open-prs
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh pr list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh pr list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))
